scripts.test: for dir in plugins/mc-*/; do test -f "$dir/vitest.config.ts" -o -f "$dir/vitest.config.js" || continue; echo "Testing $(basename $dir)..."; (cd $dir && npx vitest run) || exit 1; done
scripts.test:coverage: for dir in plugins/mc-*/; do test -f "$dir/vitest.config.ts" -o -f "$dir/vitest.config.js" || continue; echo "Coverage: $(basename $dir)..."; (cd $dir && npx vitest run --coverage) || true; done
